author: nflaig
content: <@592004585506340885> https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5308, this came up when running tests up to gloas, it didn't show up before because the shape of the state was the same (or rather the subset of fields was) and you could deserialize a fulu state using a capella ssz container

content: I am still re-running all gossip validation tests against lodestar to make sure it passes

author: nflaig
content: one thing to point out in that test is that the state is from capella, even though it tests pre-capella

author: nflaig
content: I am not sure you can emit a bellatrix state for `capella` tests? would need to dig more into it but emitting a bellatrix state caused issues for us as we try to deserialize it with capella container
